---
title: Playground
---

Try Panache in your browser. The embedded app below stays inside the docs site,
and you can still open it directly in a separate tab if you prefer.

[Open standalone playground](./playground.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}

<style>
  .playground-shell {
    margin-top: 1rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color, #dee2e6);
    border-radius: 0.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 0.75rem 1.5rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
  }

  .playground-frame {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 75vh;
    border: 0;
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .playground-frame {
      min-height: 85vh;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="playground-shell">
  <iframe
    class="playground-frame"
    src="./playground.html"
    title="Panache playground"
    loading="lazy"
  ></iframe>
</div>
